task: Create internal writer interface for CQRS isolation

scope.description: Create src/internal/session-writers.ts facade to isolate hook I/O from business logic, solving CQRS violation

interface_design.factory_pattern: createSessionWriters(projectRoot: string) returns bound SessionWriters instance

cqrs_violation_fixed.before: Hooks imported and called writer functions directly (appendSessionEvent, initOrUpdateSessionMetadata, appendSessionDiagnostic)
cqrs_violation_fixed.after: Hooks use sessionWriters facade which encapsulates writer access
hooks_refactored: text-complete-handler.ts - now uses writers.writeEvent(), writers.writeMeta(), writers.writeDiagnostic()

grep_verification.description: Verify no direct writer imports in hooks
grep_verification.result: only test descriptions matched (no actual imports)

notes: sessionWriters factory pattern ensures projectRoot is bound at handler creation time
Hooks create writers instance once per handler via createSessionWriters(directory)
Tool creates writers instance per-execute call using context.directory
All three writer functions (appendSessionEvent, initOrUpdateSessionMetadata, appendSessionDiagnostic) are now encapsulated behind facade
